info.title: Azure Log Analytics Network Security Perimeter APIs
info.description: Provides NSP operations for working with Log Analytics.

get.description: Lists all of the available OperationalInsights Rest API operations.
Gets the Log Analytics clusters in a subscription.
Gets recently deleted workspaces in a subscription, available for recovery.
Get the status of a long running azure asynchronous operation.
Gets a list of all Log Analytics QueryPacks within a subscription.
Gets the workspaces in a subscription.
Gets Log Analytics clusters in a resource group.
Gets a Log Analytics cluster instance.

put.description: Create or update a Log Analytics cluster.

get.description: Gets recently deleted workspaces in a resource group, available for recovery.

post.description:
Activates failover for the specified workspace.

The specified replication location must match the location of the enabled replication for this workspace. The failover operation is asynchronous and can take up to 30 minutes to complete. The status of the operation can be checked using the operationId returned in the response.

get.description: Gets a list of Log Analytics QueryPacks within a resource group.

put.description: Creates a Log Analytics QueryPack. Note: You cannot specify a different value for InstrumentationKey nor AppId in the Put operation.

get.description: Returns a Log Analytics QueryPack.

put.description: Creates (or updates) a Log Analytics QueryPack. Note: You cannot specify a different value for InstrumentationKey nor AppId in the Put operation.

patch.description: Updates an existing QueryPack's tags. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.

get.description: Gets a list of Queries defined within a Log Analytics QueryPack.
Gets a specific Log Analytics Query defined within a Log Analytics QueryPack.

put.description: Adds or Updates a specific Query within a Log Analytics QueryPack.

patch.description: Adds or Updates a specific Query within a Log Analytics QueryPack.

delete.description: Deletes a specific Query defined within an Log Analytics QueryPack.

post.description: Search a list of Queries defined within a Log Analytics QueryPack according to given search properties.

get.description: Gets workspaces in a resource group.
Gets a workspace instance.

delete.description: Deletes a workspace resource. To recover the workspace, create it again with the same name, in the same subscription, resource group and location. The name is kept for 14 days and cannot be used for another workspace. To remove the workspace completely and release the name, use the force flag.

get.description: Gets the available service tiers for the workspace.
Lists the data export instances within a workspace.
Gets a data export instance.

put.description: Create or update a data export.

delete.description: Deletes the specified data export in a given workspace..

get.description: Gets the first page of data source instances in a workspace with the link to the next page.
Gets a datasource instance.

put.description: Create or update a data source.

post.description:
Deactivates failover for the specified workspace.

The failback operation is asynchronous and can take up to 30 minutes to complete. The status of the operation can be checked using the operationId returned in the response.

get.description: Lists all the intelligence packs possible and whether they are enabled or disabled for a given workspace.

post.description: Disables an intelligence pack for a given workspace.
Enables an intelligence pack for a given workspace.

get.description: Gets the linked services instances in a workspace.
Gets a linked service instance.

put.description: Create or update a linked service.

get.description: Gets all linked storage accounts associated with the specified workspace, storage accounts will be sorted by their data source type.
Gets all linked storage account of a specific data source type associated with the specified workspace.

put.description: Create or Update a link relation between current workspace and a group of storage accounts of a specific data source type.

delete.description: Deletes all linked storage accounts of a specific data source type associated with the specified workspace.

get.description: Gets a list of management groups connected to a workspace.
Gets a list of NSP configurations for specified workspace.
Gets a network security perimeter configuration.

post.description: Reconcile network security perimeter configuration for Workspace resource.

get.description: Gets status of an ongoing purge operation.

post.description:
Purges data in an Log Analytics workspace by a set of user-defined filters.

In order to manage system resources, purge requests are throttled at 50 requests per hour. You should batch the execution of purge requests by sending a single command whose predicate includes all user identities that require purging. Use the in operator to specify multiple identities. You should run the query prior to using for a purge request to verify that the results are expected.
Log Analytics only supports purge operations required for compliance with GDPR. The Log Analytics product team reserves the right to reject requests for purge operations that are not for the purpose of GDPR compliance. In the event of a dispute, please create a support ticket

x-ms-status-location.description: The location from which to request the operation status.

post.description: Regenerates the shared keys for a Log Analytics Workspace. These keys are used to connect Microsoft Operational Insights agents to the workspace.

get.description: Gets the saved searches for a given Log Analytics Workspace
Gets the specified saved search for a given workspace.

put.description: Creates or updates a saved search for a given workspace.

delete.description: Deletes the specified saved search in a given workspace.

post.description: Gets the schema for a given workspace.
Gets the shared keys for a workspace.

get.description: Lists the storage insight instances within a workspace
Gets a storage insight instance.

put.description: Create or update a storage insight.

get.description: Gets all summary rules for the specified Log Analytics workspace.
Gets Log Analytics workspace Summary rules.

put.description: Creates or updates Log Analytics workspace Summary rules.

delete.description: Deletes Log Analytics workspace Summary rules.

post.description: Retries a failed Summary rule bin.

get.description: Gets all the tables for the specified Log Analytics workspace.
Gets a Log Analytics workspace table.

put.description: Update or Create a Log Analytics workspace table.

patch.description: Update a Log Analytics workspace table.

delete.description: Delete a Log Analytics workspace table.

post.description: Cancel a log analytics workspace search results table query run.
Migrate a Log Analytics table from support of the Data Collector API and Custom Fields features to support of Data Collection Rule-based Custom Logs.

get.description: Gets a list of usage metrics for a workspace.

AssociatedWorkspace.description: The list of Log Analytics workspaces associated with the cluster.

resourceId.description: Associated workspace arm resource id, in the form of: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}.

serviceTier.description: The name of the Service Tier.

enabled.description: True if the Service Tier is enabled for the workspace.

minimumRetention.description: The minimum retention for the Service Tier, in days.

maximumRetention.description: The maximum retention for the Service Tier, in days.

defaultRetention.description: The default retention for the Service Tier, in days.

capacityReservationLevel.description: The capacity reservation level in GB per day. Returned for the Capacity Reservation Service Tier.

lastSkuUpdate.description: Time when the sku was last updated for the workspace. Returned for the Capacity Reservation Service Tier.
The last time Sku was updated.

Cluster.description: The top level Log Analytics cluster resource container.

ClusterPatch.description: The top level Log Analytics cluster resource container.

billingType.description: Configures whether billing will be only on the cluster or each workspace will be billed by its proportional use. This does not change the overall billing, only how it will be distributed. Default value is 'Cluster'

clusterId.description: The ID associated with the cluster.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the cluster.

isDoubleEncryptionEnabled.description: Configures whether cluster will use double encryption. This Property can not be modified after cluster creation. Default value is 'true'

isAvailabilityZonesEnabled.description: Sets whether the cluster will support availability zones. This can be set as true only in regions where Azure Data Explorer support Availability Zones. This Property can not be modified after cluster creation. Default value is 'true' if region supports Availability Zones.

billingType.description: Configures whether billing will be only on the cluster or each workspace will be billed by its proportional use. This does not change the overall billing, only how it will be distributed. Default value is 'Cluster'

lastModifiedDate.description: The last time the cluster was updated.

associatedWorkspaces.description: The list of Log Analytics workspaces associated with the cluster

location.description: The secondary location of the replication. If replication is being enabled, enabled must be provided.

enabled.description: Specifies whether the replication is enabled or not. When true the cluster is replicate to the specified location.

isAvailabilityZonesEnabled.description: Should enable AvailabilityZones for the given replicated cluster

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the cluster replication.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last time the cluster's replication was updated.

capacity.description: The capacity reservation level in Gigabytes for this cluster.

CoreSummary.description: The core summary of a search.

status.description: The status of a core summary.

numberOfDocuments.description: The number of documents of a core summary.

DataExport.description: The top level data export resource container.

DataExportListResult.description: Result of the request to list data exports.

value.description: List of data export instances within a workspace..

tableNames.description: An array of tables to export, for example: [“Heartbeat, SecurityEvent”].

createdDate.description: The latest data export rule modification time.

lastModifiedDate.description: Date and time when the export was last modified.

properties.description: The data source properties in raw json format, each kind of data source have it's own schema.

etag.description: The ETag of the data source.

DataSourceFilter.description: DataSource filter. Right now, only filter by kind is supported.

resourceId.description: The destination resource ID. This can be copied from the Properties entry of the destination resource in Azure.

type.description: The type of the destination resource

eventHubName.description: Optional. Allows to define an Event Hub name. Not applicable when destination is Storage Account.

principalId.description: The principal ID of resource identity.

userAssignedIdentities.description: The list of user identities associated with the resource. The user identity dictionary key references will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}'.

IntelligencePack.description: Intelligence Pack containing a string name and boolean indicating if it's enabled.

name.description: The name of the intelligence pack.

enabled.description: The enabled boolean for the intelligence pack.

displayName.description: The display name of the intelligence pack.

LinkedService.description: The top level Linked service resource container.

properties.description: The properties of the linked service.

LinkedServiceListResult.description: The list linked service operation response.

value.description: The list of linked service instances

resourceId.description: The resource id of the resource that will be linked to the workspace. This should be used for linking resources which require read access

writeAccessResourceId.description: The resource id of the resource that will be linked to the workspace. This should be used for linking resources which require write access

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the linked service.

LinkedStorageAccountsListResult.description: The list linked storage accounts service operation response.

value.description: A list of linked storage accounts instances.

LinkedStorageAccountsResource.description: Linked storage accounts top level resource container.

properties.description: Properties that define a Log Analytics QueryPack resource.

LogAnalyticsQueryPackProperties.description: Properties that define a Log Analytics QueryPack resource.

queryPackId.description: The unique ID of your application. This field cannot be changed.

timeCreated.description: Creation Date for the Log Analytics QueryPack, in ISO 8601 format.

timeModified.description: Last modified date of the Log Analytics QueryPack, in ISO 8601 format.

provisioningState.description: Current state of this QueryPack: whether or not is has been provisioned within the resource group it is defined. Users cannot change this value but are able to read from it. Values will include Succeeded, Deploying, Canceled, and Failed.

properties.description: Properties that define an Log Analytics QueryPack-Query resource.

LogAnalyticsQueryPackQueryProperties.description: Properties that define an Log Analytics QueryPack-Query resource.

id.description: The unique ID of your application. This field cannot be changed.

displayName.description: Unique display name for your query within the Query Pack.

timeCreated.description: Creation Date for the Log Analytics Query, in ISO 8601 format.

timeModified.description: Last modified date of the Log Analytics Query, in ISO 8601 format.

author.description: Object Id of user creating the query.

related.description: The related metadata items for the function.

categories.description: The related categories for the function.

resourceTypes.description: The related resource types for the function.

solutions.description: The related Log Analytics solutions for the function.

properties.description: Additional properties that can be set for the query.

LogAnalyticsQueryPackQuerySearchProperti.description: Properties that define an Log Analytics QueryPack-Query search properties.

related.description: The related metadata items for the function.

categories.description: The related categories for the function.

resourceTypes.description: The related resource types for the function.

solutions.description: The related Log Analytics solutions for the function.

ManagementGroup.description: A management group that is connected to a workspace

properties.description: The properties of the management group.

serverCount.description: The number of servers connected to the management group.

isGateway.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the management group is a gateway.

id.description: The unique ID of the management group.

created.description: The datetime that the management group was created.

dataReceived.description: The last datetime that the management group received data.

version.description: The version of System Center that is managing the management group.

sku.description: The SKU of System Center that is managing the management group.

value.description: The system name of the metric.

localizedValue.description: The localized name of the metric.

Operation.description: Supported operation of OperationalInsights resource provider.

display.description: Display metadata associated with the operation.

resource.description: Resource on which the operation is performed etc.

operation.description: Type of operation: get, read, delete, etc.

startTime.description: The start time of the operation.

endTime.description: The end time of the operation.

error.description: The error detail of the operation if any.

PrivateLinkScopedResource.description: The private link scope resource reference.

resourceId.description: The full resource Id of the private link scope resource.

scopeId.description: The private link scope unique Identifier.

startRestoreTime.description: The timestamp to start the restore from (UTC).

endRestoreTime.description: The timestamp to end the restore by (UTC).

sourceTable.description: The table to restore data from.

azureAsyncOperationId.description: Search results table async operation id.

ingestedRecords.description: The number of rows that were returned by the search job.

scannedGb.description: Search job: Amount of scanned data.

binSize.description: Scheduled window in minutes. Allowed values: 20, 30, 60, 120, 180, 360, 720, 1440.

binDelay.description: The minimum delay in seconds before bin processing.

binStartTime.description: The start time (UTC) when Summary rule execution starts.

timeSelector.description: The time cursor used in Summary rules bins processing, e.g. TimeGenerated.

destinationTable.description: The destination table used for the Summary rule results.

SavedSearch.description: Value object for saved search results.

etag.description: The ETag of the saved search. To override an existing saved search, use "*" or specify the current Etag

properties.description: The properties of the saved search.

SavedSearchProperties.description: Value object for saved search results.

category.description: The category of the saved search. This helps the user to find a saved search faster.

query.description: The query expression for the saved search.

functionAlias.description: The function alias if query serves as a function.

functionParameters.description: The optional function parameters if query serves as a function. Value should be in the following format: 'param-name1:type1 = default_value1, param-name2:type2 = default_value2'. For more examples and proper syntax please refer to https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/kusto/query/functions/user-defined-functions.

version.description: The version number of the query language. The current version is 2 and is the default.

tags.description: The tags attached to the saved search.

SavedSearchesListResult.description: The saved search list operation response.

columns.description: A list of table custom columns.

standardColumns.description: A list of table standard columns.

tableSubType.description: The subtype describes what APIs can be used to interact with the table, and what features are available against it.

solutions.description: List of solutions the table is affiliated with

requestId.description: The request id of the search.

total.description: The total number of search results.

top.description: The number of top search results.

id.description: The id of the search results request.

status.description: The status of the search results.

startTime.description: The start time for the search.

eTag.description: The ETag of the search results.

sum.description: The sum of all aggregates returned in the result set.

max.description: The max of all aggregates returned in the result set.

name.description: The name of the metadata schema.

version.description: The version of the metadata schema.

SearchResults.description: Parameters of the search job that initiated this table.

limit.description: Limit the search job to return up to specified number of rows.

startSearchTime.description: The timestamp to start the search from (UTC)

endSearchTime.description: The timestamp to end the search by (UTC)

sourceTable.description: The table used in the search job.

azureAsyncOperationId.description: Search results table async operation id.

displayName.description: The display name of the schema.

indexed.description: The boolean that indicates the field is searchable as free text.

facet.description: The boolean that indicates whether or not the field is a facet.

ownerType.description: The array of workflows containing the field.

order.description: The sort order of the search.

SharedKeys.description: The shared keys for a workspace.

primarySharedKey.description: The primary shared key of a workspace.

secondarySharedKey.description: The secondary shared key of a workspace.

id.description: The Azure Resource Manager ID of the storage account resource.

eTag.description: The ETag of the storage insight.

StorageInsightListResult.description: The list storage insights operation response.

value.description: A list of storage insight items.

@odata.nextLink.description: The link (url) to the next page of results.

containers.description: The names of the blob containers that the workspace should read

tables.description: The names of the Azure tables that the workspace should read

status.description: The status of the storage insight

StorageInsightStatus.description: The status of the storage insight.

state.description: The state of the storage insight connection to the workspace

description.description: Description of the state of the storage insight.

displayName.description: The display name of the Summary rule.

description.description: The description of the Summary rule.

isActive.description: Indicates if Summary rule is active. If not, Summary rule execution stops.

statusCode.description: Indicates the reason for rule deactivation.

provisioningState.description: Summary rule is in provisioning state. If set to 'updating' or 'deleting', indicates a resource lock due to an ongoing operation, preventing any update to the Summary rule until the operation is complete.

SummaryLogsRetryBin.description: Request to retry a summary logs bin.

SummaryLogsRetryBinProperties.description: Properties for retrying a Summary rule bin.

retryBinStartTime.description: The time (UTC) of the bin to retry.

retentionInDays.description: In Analytics table: the tables analytics retention in days, between 4 and 730. Setting this property to -1 will default to the workspace retention. In Basic and Auxiliary table: read only property.

totalRetentionInDays.description: The table total retention in days, between 4 and 4383. Setting this property to -1 will default to retentionInDays.

archiveRetentionInDays.description: The tables long-term retention in days. Calculated as (totalRetentionInDays-retentionInDays).

searchResults.description: Parameters of the search job that initiated this table.

restoredLogs.description: Parameters of the restore operation that initiated this table.

plan.description: Instruct the system how to handle and charge the logs ingested to this table.

lastPlanModifiedDate.description: The timestamp that table plan was last modified (UTC).

provisioningState.description: Table's current provisioning state. If set to 'updating', indicates a resource lock due to ongoing operation, forbidding any update to the table until the ongoing operation is concluded.

retentionInDaysAsDefault.description: True - Value originates from workspace retention in days, False - Customer specific.

totalRetentionInDaysAsDefault.description: True - Value originates from retention in days, False - Customer specific.

Tag.description: A tag of a saved search.

TagsResource.description: A container holding only the Tags for a resource, allowing the user to update the tags on a QueryPack instance.

UsageMetric.description: A metric describing the usage of a resource.

unit.description: The units used for the metric.

currentValue.description: The current value of the metric.

limit.description: The quota limit for the metric.

nextResetTime.description: The time that the metric's value will reset.

quotaPeriod.description: The quota period that determines the length of time between value resets.

principalId.description: The principal id of user assigned identity.

clientId.description: The client id of user assigned identity.

Workspace.description: The top level Workspace resource container.

WorkspaceCapping.description: The daily volume cap for ingestion.

dailyQuotaGb.description: The workspace daily quota for ingestion.

quotaNextResetTime.description: The time when the quota will be rest.

dataIngestionStatus.description: The status of data ingestion for this workspace.

WorkspaceFailoverProperties.description: The failover state of the replication.

state.description: The failover state of the replication.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last time when the failover state was updated.

enableDataExport.description: Flag that indicate if data should be exported.

immediatePurgeDataOn30Days.description: Flag that describes if we want to remove the data after 30 days.

enableLogAccessUsingOnlyResourcePermissi.description: Flag that indicate which permission to use - resource or workspace or both.

clusterResourceId.description: Dedicated LA cluster resourceId that is linked to the workspaces.

unifiedSentinelBillingOnly.description: An indication if the specify workspace is limited to sentinel's unified billing model only.

associations.description: List of associations for the workspace. Indicates if the workspace is associated with any of the following experiences: MDC, Sentinel, SentinelGraph, etc.

WorkspaceListManagementGroupsResult.description: The list workspace management groups operation response.

value.description: Gets or sets a list of management groups attached to the workspace.

WorkspaceListUsagesResult.description: The list workspace usages operation response.

value.description: Gets or sets a list of usage metrics for a workspace.

WorkspacePatch.description: The top level Workspace resource container.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the workspace.

customerId.description: This is a read-only property. Represents the ID associated with the workspace.

retentionInDays.description: The workspace data retention in days. Allowed values are per pricing plan. See pricing tiers documentation for details.

workspaceCapping.description: The daily volume cap for ingestion.

publicNetworkAccessForIngestion.description: The network access type for operating on the Log Analytics Workspace. By default it is Enabled

publicNetworkAccessForQuery.description: The network access type for operating on the Log Analytics Workspace. By default it is Enabled

forceCmkForQuery.description: Indicates whether customer managed storage is mandatory for query management.

privateLinkScopedResources.description: List of linked private link scope resources.

defaultDataCollectionRuleResourceId.description: The resource ID of the default Data Collection Rule to use for this workspace. Expected format is - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/dataCollectionRules/{dcrName}.

WorkspacePurgeBody.description: Describes the body of a purge request for an App Insights Workspace

table.description: Table from which to purge data.

filters.description: The set of columns and filters (queries) to run over them to purge the resulting data.

WorkspacePurgeBodyFilters.description: User-defined filters to return data which will be purged from the table.

column.description: The column of the table over which the given query should run

operator.description: A query operator to evaluate over the provided column and value(s). Supported operators are ==, =~, in, in~, >, >=, <, <=, between, and have the same behavior as they would in a KQL query.

value.description: the value for the operator to function over. This can be a number (e.g., > 100), a string (timestamp >= '2017-09-01') or array of values.

key.description: When filtering over custom dimensions, this key will be used as the name of the custom dimension.

WorkspacePurgeResponse.description: Response containing operationId for a specific purge action.

operationId.description: Id to use when querying for status for a particular purge operation.

WorkspacePurgeStatusResponse.description: Response containing status for a specific purge operation.

status.description: Status of the operation represented by the requested Id.

enabled.description: Specifies whether the replication is enabled or not. When true, workspace configuration and data is replicated to the specified location.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the replication.

createdDate.description: The last time when the replication was enabled.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last time when the replication was updated.

enabled.description: Specifies whether the replication is enabled or not. When true, workspace configuration and data is replicated to the specified location. If replication is been enabled, location must be provided.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the replication.

createdDate.description: The last time when the replication was enabled.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last time when the replication was updated.

capacityReservationLevel.description: The capacity reservation level in GB for this workspace, when CapacityReservation sku is selected.

lastSkuUpdate.description: The last time when the sku was updated.

keyVaultUri.description: The Key Vault uri which holds they key associated with the Log Analytics cluster.

keyName.description: The name of the key associated with the Log Analytics cluster.

keyVersion.description: The version of the key associated with the Log Analytics cluster.
